---
title: "sv_engine.py"
path: "src/core/sv_engine.py"
overall_score: 5.00
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 8.00
---

## Intent
Mock intent for sv_engine.py

## Interaction Protocol
Standard interaction.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8.0/10
- **Vigil [V]**: 0.0/10
- **Stability [T]**: 9.6/10
- **Coupling [C]**: 6.0/10
- **Aesthetic [E]**: 9.3/10
- **Anomaly [A]**: 0.7/10
- **Sovereignty [Ω]**: 0.50/1.0

## Neural Pathways
Sector scoured and verified by the One Mind.
